name: grill-me
description: One-question-at-a-time plan and design interview skill for reaching shared understanding before implementation.

interface.shortDescription: Interview plans one decision at a time.
interface.longDescription: Grill Me helps Codex pressure-test plans, designs, and implementation strategies through a strict one-question-at-a-time interview. It explores available facts, recommends an answer for each decision, records concise decisions, and stops at shared understanding before implementation.
defaultPrompt: Interview me relentlessly about this plan.
Grill my implementation strategy one decision at a time.
Help me reach shared understanding before coding.
